channel.title: wikileaks on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in wikileaks on Have an average day :|

item.title: Bradley Manning's treatment was cruel and inhuman, UN torture chief rules
item.description: Bradley Manning’s treatment was cruel and inhuman, UN torture chief rules | World news | guardian.co.uk. This makes me happy. We (The US) need to be called out on this kind of bullshit. We can’t expect our words to hold any weight if we aren’t willing to hold ourselves to the same level of accountability. On a side note I’m a firm believer of government transparency, we (the people) pay for the government, it works for us.
